GenAiFunction.description:
Run a self-check of all My Org Butler dependencies and return a status report for each. Probes five systems: Salesforce REST API, Data Cloud SSOT API, the Tavily named credential, the Memory__c object, and the CustomSetting__c object.
Use when: - The user asks whether the agent is healthy, working, or ready. - The user reports something is broken and wants to diagnose which dependency has failed. - The user asks "are you working?", "check your dependencies", or "run a health check".
NOT for: - General org diagnostics — use ExploreOrgSchema, CallMetadataApi, or CallToolingApi for those. - Querying org data — use QueryRecordsWithSoql.
